summary: Integrated ADR 0303 onto latest `origin/main` baseline `2589093d44df851883360a9de929f2a610b4d4cb` as repository version `0.177.121` while preserving live platform version `0.130.77`. The final exact-main closeout records the repo-managed PostgreSQL pgaudit rollout, the stabilized guest-log-shipping verification contract, the repaired monitoring-to-NATS firewall allow, the successful unknown-role alert relay POST, and the matching JetStream publication for role `adr0303_smoke_9279c7f7` on `platform.security.pgaudit_unknown_role`.

verification.observed: The targeted ADR 0303 test bundle `tests/test_guest_log_shipping_playbook.py`, `tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py`, and `tests/unit/test_event_taxonomy.py` passed with `25 passed in 0.72s`, preserving the stabilized guest-log-shipping metrics verification contract after the latest `origin/main` integration.

The integrated tree keeps passing branch-local evidence for `converge-postgres-vm`, `converge-guest-log-shipping`, `converge-grafana`, and `converge-nats-jetstream`, and the final smoke receipt proves the Alertmanager relay plus JetStream publication path end to end for the fresh unknown-role alert.

The repository release cut advanced `VERSION` to `0.177.121`, refreshed the canonical truth surfaces, updated ADR/workstream metadata, and recorded ADR 0303 as implemented on `main` without changing the already-current platform version.

The final exact-main closeout re-ran the governed release-status, canonical-truth, receipt, and repository-validation paths together with the guarded `live-apply-service` wrapper for `guest-log-shipping`, proving the repo automation path instead of relying only on direct playbook replays.

notes: ADR 0303 is first implemented in repository version `0.177.121` and first verified live on platform version `0.130.77`.
The final smoke proved the alert relay and NATS publication path after repairing a missing live guest-firewall allow on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

The broad guest-network-policy replay still surfaced an unrelated `postgres-replica-lv3` SSH reachability failure; that residual issue is preserved as evidence but does not block ADR 0303 itself because the repaired runtime path now functions end to end.
